---
name: New document
about: Register a new official document (proposal, compromise text, report, opinion)
title: "[DOC] <institutional ID> — <short description> (<ISO date>)"
labels: document
---

## Document metadata

- **Institutional ID:** (e.g. ST 9547/26, COM(2025) 837, PE782.xxx)
- **Title:**
- **Body / institution:** (Commission / Council / Parliament / EDPB-EDPS / EESC / ECB / national parliament / stakeholder)
- **Date (ISO):**
- **LIMITE / restricted?:** (yes/no)
- **Authoritative URL:**
- **Public mirror URL (if LIMITE):**
